assertions.expectation: Proposes a phased approach: control plane first, then CPU pools, then T4 dev, then inference (A100), then training (H100) last
assertions.reason: The response does not mention control plane upgrade at all, and the phasing is CPU first, T4 dev second, A100 inference third, H100 training last - missing the control plane first step

assertions.expectation: Control plane can be upgraded independently without affecting running workloads
assertions.reason: No mention of control plane upgrade or its independence from workloads

assertions.expectation: CPU service pools upgraded first as lowest risk — use standard surge settings (maxSurge=2-3)
assertions.reason: CPU pools are upgraded first, but uses maxSurge=100 and maxUnavailable=50, not the standard maxSurge=2-3 settings

assertions.expectation: T4 dev pool upgraded next — dev workloads are tolerant of interruption
assertions.reason: T4 dev pool is upgraded second (Phase 2) with acknowledgment that development workloads are more tolerant to interruption

assertions.expectation: A100 inference pool upgraded with careful surge settings (maxSurge=1) and PDBs to maintain serving capacity
assertions.reason: A100 inference pool is upgraded with rolling update strategy but uses maxSurge=25% in deployment and maxSurge=10 in node pool upgrade, not maxSurge=1, and no mention of PDBs

assertions.expectation: H100 training pool upgraded last, during a scheduled gap between training runs — with cordon-and-wait or maxSurge=0/maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: H100 training pool is upgraded last and mentions coordination with training schedules, but uses maxSurge=50/maxUnavailable=25, not cordon-and-wait or maxSurge=0/maxUnavailable=1

assertions.expectation: Notes the 20-node parallelism limit — at 5,000 nodes, the full upgrade will take weeks and must span multiple maintenance windows
assertions.reason: No mention of the 20-node parallelism limit that would constrain upgrade speed across such a large fleet

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver compatibility testing in staging before each GPU pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade preparation section mentions 'Verify GPU driver compatibility with new Kubernetes version' and 'Test v1.32 compatibility in staging environment'

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPUDirect/RDMA networking validation after upgrading the H100 pool
assertions.reason: No mention of GPUDirect or RDMA networking validation for the H100 training infrastructure
